title: 11L XSA + SmearGate + BigramHash + SWA (mean val_bpb=1.1565, 3 seeds)
body:
## Summary — Updated from 1.1754 to 1.1538

**Mean val_bpb: 1.1565 (3 seeds)** | Best: 1.1538 (seed 1337) | Artifact: ~15.9 MB

23 GPU runs on 8xH100 SXM5, testing XSA, EMA, depth recurrence, seq curriculum, LR sweep, and more.

## Techniques (11 stacked improvements)

- **11 transformer layers** + XSA on last 4 layers (arXiv:2603.09078)
- **SmearGate + BigramHash(2048)** + OrthoInit (critical co-dependency per #212)
- **INT6 per-row quantization + zstd-22** + FP16 tied embedding + Late-K FP16
- **SWA (every 50 steps, fp32 accumulation)** — bf16 causes catastrophic loss
- **Muon WD=0.04** + grad clip 0.3 + RoPE base 50K
- **Overtone SVD init + Phase-transition residual mixing**
- **MLP 2.75x** — sweet spot (3x doesn't fit with SmearGate at 11L)

## Results (3 seeds)

| Seed | Sliding BPB | Post-quant BPB | Artifact |
|------|-------------|----------------|----------|
| 1337 | **1.1538** | 1.1766 | 15.99 MB |
| 42 | 1.1565 | 1.1790 | 15.87 MB |
| 7 | 1.1593 | 1.1820 | 15.93 MB |
| **Mean** | **1.1565** | | |

## Key Findings from 23 Runs

- EMA(0.997) causes 0.14 BPB quantization gap — SWA is far better for our stack
- 11L MLP 3x exceeds 16MB with SmearGate+BigramHash
- SmearGate removal to fit MLP 3x loses more than it gains
- XSA requires GQA-compatible v expansion (repeat_interleave)
- Seq length curriculum doesn't work (SWA checkpoint incompatibility)
- Depth recurrence works but dim=640 too narrow; dim=768+ exceeds 16MB
- Higher LR (0.03) improves BPB but worsens compression (larger weights)

## Test plan

- [x] Runs reproducibly on 8xH100 SXM in under 10 minutes
- [x] Artifact size under 16 MB (15.87-15.99 MB across 3 seeds)
- [x] Sliding window evaluation completes within 10 minutes
- [x] 3-seed validation (mean 1.1565, std 0.0028)


Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

comments.body: Closing in favor of new PR with updated results (1.1754 -> 1.1538 BPB). Will resubmit as fresh PR.
